'''Bullyak''' was the alpha female of the [[Gakfedd tribe|Gakfedd clan]] who was captured by the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. She and [[Ugbuz]] dressed and splinted [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] leg when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was injured in a battle against the opposing [[Klagg tribe|Klagg clan]].
